name: Sauerkraut Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars, corn syrup, and half-and-half in a 3-quart heavy saucepan with buttered sides.
2. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking to the soft ball stage (238-240°F).
4. Remove from heat and add butter and salt without stirring.
5. Cool to lukewarm (110°F). Stir in vanilla until creamy; mixture loses gloss and becomes opaque.
6. Fold in coconut all at once.
7. Pour onto a buttered, chilled platter or into an 8 or 9-inch square pan.
8. Cut into slices if thick or into 49 squares if molded in the pan.
9. Makes about 2 1/4 pounds.
(You can't miss with this combination of lots of coconut in Penuche)
